## Meeting Purpose

[Technical discussion interview with Clint Irvin for a Data Scientist role.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Hybrid Modeling for Unseen Events:** At Synovus, Clint built a hybrid model (ARIMA + 1D ConvNet) to forecast bank balances, preventing $3–4M in bond-cashing penalties by distinguishing payroll dips from actual bank runs.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [**LLM-Driven Automation:** At MDLynx, Clint built a multi-agent system to automate 90% of RFP responses, freeing specialists for higher-value work.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [**LLM Search Strategy:** Proposed a three-part strategy for GrowthX: 1) Measure visibility with query variations, 2) Reverse-engineer LLM behavior with a custom RAG engine, and 3) Use an LLM to grade content features for ML analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [**Role & Infrastructure:** The role is foundational, starting with an evaluation pipeline. The tech stack is open, though current pipelines use Temporal and Ruby.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3522.0)

## Topics

### Background & Experience

  - [**Education:** PhD in Social Experimental Psychology with a doctoral minor in Statistics.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Career Progression:** Data Scientist → ML Engineer → AI Engineer.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Government (Homeland Security, Los Alamos, Military):**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [Built systems for marksmanship capture and situational awareness optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Automated statistical analyses and research methodologies.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Synovus (Bank):**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [Built the "ariminator" system to automate DFAST regulatory models (ARIMA).](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Impact:** Reduced model refresh time from hours to \~1 hour, enabling a 2-person team to manage hundreds of models annually.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**Amazon (Alexa Marketing Science):**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [Lead Data Scientist focused on personalization and cross-sell.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [**Stealth Startup (Nomi):**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Built a Perplexity-style RAG search engine for real-time news.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [Developed a sentiment analysis pipeline using fine-tuned `XML-RoBERTa` for better semantic understanding than dictionary-based methods.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [**MDLynx (Current):**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
      - [**RFP Automation:** Multi-agent system automating 90% of RFP responses.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
      - [**Conference Coverage:** System to summarize medical conference abstracts.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
      - [**Content Recommendation:** Engine to break out of a "local minima" where content is over-optimized for a single subgroup.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)

### Case Study: Forecasting Bank Balances

  - [**Problem:** Unpredictable payroll cycles caused large, temporary balance dips, leading the treasurer to cash in bonds at a penalty ($3–4M loss).](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)
  - [**Goal:** Forecast daily account balances 2 months out to distinguish payroll dips from actual bank runs.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [**Solution:** A hybrid model inspired by IBM's R2N2 paper.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
    1.  [**Pre-process:** Each account's time series was pre-whitened and differenced (ARIMA).](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
    2.  [**Model Residuals:** A 1D Convolutional Neural Network (ConvNet) was trained on the normalized residuals.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
    3.  [**Predict & Reconstruct:** The model predicted 60 steps out; results were then rescaled and re-transformed.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)
    4.  [**Prediction Intervals:** Overlapping windows were used to generate prediction intervals, flagging significant deviations.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2543.0)
  - [**Business Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2661.0)
      - [**Treasury:** Eliminated the need to cash in bonds at a penalty.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2661.0)
      - [**Private Wealth:** Identified high-value accounts with unexpected balance increases (e.g., \>$750k) for targeted outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2599.0)

### Case Study: Measuring LLM Search Visibility

  - [**Goal:** Measure and optimize brand visibility in LLM search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google).](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [**Proposed Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2766.0)
      - [**Coverage:** Presence across target LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2857.0)
      - [**Consistency:** Stability of results over time (e.g., 48-hour hourly checks).](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2891.0)
      - [**Robustness:** Presence across query variations (e.g., 50–100 reformulations).](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [**Proposed ML Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3099.0)
    1.  [**Data Collection:** Run queries, log results, and crawl source pages.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
    2.  [**Feature Engineering:** Use an LLM to grade content features (e.g., length, tone, bullet points) against a rubric.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3221.0)
    3.  [**Modeling:** Use logistic regression to predict visibility based on content features.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3283.0)
    4.  [**Reverse Engineering:** Build a custom RAG engine to isolate and study the prioritization logic of specific LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3425.0)

### Role & Infrastructure

  - [**First Project:** Build an evaluation pipeline for the content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3522.0)
  - [**Tech Stack:** Open to Python. Current pipelines use Temporal and Ruby.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3617.0)
  - [**LLM Coding:** Use LLMs for planning and rapid prototyping, but always review and refine the generated code.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tucker:** Follow up with Clint Irvin regarding the next steps in the interview process.](https://fathom.video/share/vJszhmf8zrQsL7BVooeEdBzx6ZyVYTL7?tab=summary&timestamp=3915.0)
